name: Maverick Storm 2 BeamWash
comment: Maverick Storm 2 Beamwash: Maverick Storm 2 BeamWash brings an arsenal of FX with arena scale reach. Its advanced alloy design weighs in under 50 pounds, delivering IP65 durability that loads in light, ruggedly housing an optical system that zooms in tight, blasting aerial beams that narrow to under 4 degrees. Go wild with individual pixel control made easy with a massive library of onboard effect macros. Get serious with dual mode control that enlists multiple protocols to separately command mappable eye candy and precision maneuvers. This Maverick packs a mean streak with a fiercely dynamic RGB outer ring that slips undercover instantly behind its stealth filter. Lighter and brighter, with nearly 10,000 lumens of output, the Maverick Storm 2 BeamWash arrives calibrated to match its fellow Mavericks in the rig.
